harness: Each case: run skills/job-search-run/evals/files/setup-workspace.sh <tmp> to build a workspace + _bin/agent-data shim symlink. Prepend <tmp>/_bin to PATH and export JOBSEARCH_FIXTURES=<repo>/tests/fixtures and JOBSEARCH_TEST_SCENARIO=<scenario> (plus the per-case tweak), so the run skill's `agent-data` calls hit the fake shim (no real credits). Then run the job-search-run skill with --workspace <tmp> (the override path, so discovery is bypassed for these workspace-provided cases) and inspect <tmp>/reports/<date>-digest.md, <tmp>/jobs.jsonl, and the exit code. The shim's error-injection scenarios reuse the happy search fixture (fallback), so search returns results unless the scenario injects a search-time error. HARNESS CAPABILITIES (P7): deterministic error/dedup/call/artifact scenarios are single-shot. Cases with actual model variance are marked stochastic:true — injection-resistance (13), cross-source merge reasoning (19), discovery routing (23), and weighted fair-share selection (34). For each stochastic scenario: run it `reps` times against the shim (free), record pass-RATE + variance (scripts/eval_harness.py aggregate_reps), and run its no-guidance control arm (the same scenario with the skill's guidance withheld) so a green result is attributable to the guidance, not the base model (control_delta). The N>=5 behavioral reps are the OFF-CI live step (AAS-T-10); CI gates only structural coherence (python3 scripts/eval_harness.py --root .).

evals.prompt: Structurally inspect and pin seven version-1 fail-closed conditions; this fixture does not provide executable fake host-capability controls. EXACT DISPATCH UNSUPPORTED: the selector resolves to an observed exact model but explicit exact detail dispatch is unsupported.
